name: python3-google-auth-httplib2
title: python3-google-auth-httplib2
description:
Google Authentication Library: httplib2 transport
Python library providing a httplib2 transport for google-auth.
.
Note that httplib has lots of problems such as lack of thread safety and
insecure usage of TLS. Using it is highly discouraged.
.
This library is intended to help existing users of oauth2client migrate
to google-auth.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-google-auth-httplib2 because Google Authentication Library: httplib2 transport.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-google-auth-httplib2 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-google-auth-httplib2 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-google-auth-httplib2 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
